x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage-based Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax is a percentage of the base amount

Comment:
Example
Interest earned: €200
Tax rate: 25%→
 Tax = €50

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax is a fixed value regardless of base

Comment:
Example
Tax per transaction: €3→
 Every transaction → Tax = €3

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Different tax rates apply to different portions of the base

Comment:
Example
First €100 → 10% = €10
Remaining €100 → 20% = €20→
 Total Tax = €30

x-enumeration-literals.name: Inclusive Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax is already included in the amount and must be extracted

Comment:
Example
Total amount: €120 (includes tax)
Tax rate: 20%→
 Tax = €20

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exclusive Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax is added on top of the base amount

Comment:
Example
Fee: €100
Tax rate: 20%→
 Tax = €20→
 Total = €120

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based Tax Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax applies only if a threshold is exceeded

Comment:
Example
Interest = €80 → No tax
Interest = €150 → Tax applies on €150
